shellCommands.command:
cat > /home/user/workspace/manager_decisions.json <<'EOF'
{"14268": {"selected_proposal_id": 1}}
EOF
cd /home/user/workspace && npm run build

find /home/user/workspace -maxdepth 2 -name package.json -o -name package-lock.json -o -name pnpm-lock.yaml -o -name yarn.lock | sed 's#^#/##' | head -50 && ls -la /home/user/workspace && cat /home/user/workspace/manager_decisions.json
cd /home/user/workspace && if [ -f package.json ]; then npm run build; else echo 'SKIP_BUILD: package.json not found at repo root'; fi
